---
title: "Introduction to John Keble, The Christian Year"
---

## Introduction to John Keble, The Christian Year

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1894
**Genre:** Non-fiction, criticism
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** London: Macmillan

### Notes

This appeared in the \'Golden Treasury Series\'.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
